_comment: Real Mantle MAINNET (chainId 5000) Tier-1/Tier-2 validation targets (T12/T19). Seeded from the T2 human+on-chain-verified token map so provenance is inherited, not re-typed. Extend with further hand-picked verified contracts (DEX routers/pairs, vaults) as they are verified — the validate_tier1 harness re-confirms each address resolves to verified source on Etherscan V2 at run time.
